---
title: "District Tracker Source Diagnostics"
format: gfm
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
helper <- if (file.exists("analysis/_analysis_helpers.R")) "analysis/_analysis_helpers.R" else "../_analysis_helpers.R"
source(helper)
```

## Legacy comments

```{r legacy-comments, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_render_legacy_comments("06-match-districts-construct-district-tracking-dfs.R", from = 1, to = 220, caption = "Legacy Chunk 6: district tracker construction and QA notes")
```

```{r deviation-note, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_deviation_note("The prose above is rendered from the legacy comments. The current tables below replace manually written counts with target outputs, and separately show legacy expected-count benchmarks when the active cleaned tracker no longer contains the same raw changes.")
```

## Current targets-backed results

```{r source-counts, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "district_tracker_sources", "tracker_source_counts.csv"), "Raw district-change source coverage")
```

```{r legacy-reference, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "district_tracker_sources", "tracker_legacy_comment_reference.csv"), "Legacy comment benchmarks versus current detections")
```

```{r state-changes, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "district_tracker_sources", "tracker_state_change_events.csv"), "Current recorded state/UT change events")
```

```{r expected-state-changes, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "district_tracker_sources", "tracker_legacy_expected_state_changes.csv"), "Recorded state/UT changes noted in the legacy comments")
```

```{r unrecorded-state-changes, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "district_tracker_sources", "tracker_unrecorded_state_changes.csv"), "Unrecorded state/UT changes requiring manual attention")
```

```{r inperiod-changes, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "district_tracker_sources", "tracker_inperiod_district_changes.csv"), "Current district-name changes inside sampling periods")
```

```{r expected-inperiod, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "district_tracker_sources", "tracker_legacy_expected_inperiod_district_changes.csv"), "Legacy in-period district-name-change benchmark")
```

```{r same-name-districts, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "district_tracker_sources", "tracker_same_name_districts.csv"), "Same-name districts appearing in multiple states")
```
